purpose: Confirmed face reference registry for source-context identified portraits and later photo organization.
review_policy: This repo auto-tags people when the source itself identifies the portrait. Future unlabeled visual matches should preserve candidate/review state unless source context confirms identity.

confirmation_basis: The surrounding tourist card names the holder as DARIO PULGAR SMITH.
The portrait is attached to the same named tourist card.
references.future_use: Use as a named reference portrait for photo organization, source-context tagging, and candidate review workflows.
